neighbourhoods: a converted fire station on the east side
a corner unit next to the train station
a shopfront on the high street
a unit behind the university campus
quirks: The owner still writes the daily specials on a chalkboard and photographs it for Instagram.
They have taken every order by phone since they opened, and the phone is in the kitchen.
Their website was built by a cousin in 2016 and has not been touched since.
They sell out of sourdough by 10am most Saturdays and get complaints about it.
Half their orders come from three nearby offices placing standing Friday orders.
The owner's daughter set up an Instagram that now has more followers than the shop has customers.
pains: we are losing orders because people call while we are elbow-deep in dough
customers keep asking what is gluten free and we keep telling them one at a time
we cannot keep the website prices in step with the ones on the counter
people turn up on Mondays when we are closed, which is nobody's fault but ours
we get the same six questions on the phone every single morning

products.name: White Tin Loaf
products.description: The everyday one. Soft crumb, thin crust.

products.name: Cinnamon Morning Bun
products.description: Sticky, and we are not sorry.

products.name: Victoria Sponge Slice
products.description: Raspberry jam, no buttercream, don't argue.

products.name: Carrot Cake Slice
products.description: Cream cheese frosting, walnut on top.

products.name: Brownie
products.description: Fudgy. Gluten free by accident, not design.

features.name: product listing
features.description: Show everything we sell, with the price and what's in it. That's the whole point of the page.

features.name: contact form
features.description: Let people send us an order or a question without ringing the kitchen.

features.name: opening hours
features.description: Put our hours somewhere people will actually see them. We are shut Mondays.

features.name: category filter
features.description: People want to see just the bread, or just the cakes. Let them narrow it down.

features.name: allergen information
features.description: We are asked about gluten forty times a week. Put it on the page so we stop being asked.

features.name: navigation
features.description: A way to get around the page. Nothing fancy.

constraints: It has to look right on a phone. Most of our customers are on their phone in a queue somewhere.
Our brand colour is #6B4423. Please use it.
No carousels. The last person who built us a site put in a carousel and nobody ever saw slide two.
Don't use stock photos of bread that isn't ours. Leave a gap and we'll fill it.
The prices on the page have to match the prices in the file we sent. Exactly.
